## Self-review checklist
- [ ] My solution handles edge cases (empty input, n=0, negatives, etc.)
- [ ] I haven't modified input data that shouldn't be modified
- [ ] I've written at least one test that checks actual output values (not just length/type)
- [ ] Tests pass locally
- [ ] I can explain my solution out loud without looking at the code
